dict.string: StepComp needs access to your step count to track your progress in challenges and display your activity on leaderboards.
StepComp needs permission to save your step data for challenge tracking and progress updates.
StepComp needs access to your camera to take transformation photos and document your fitness journey.
StepComp needs access to your photo library to select transformation photos.
StepComp needs permission to save transformation photos to your photo library.
